mapper.sql: SELECT grid_code, longitude, latitude, west_longitude, east_longitude, north_latitude, south_latitude, province, city, district, create_time, update_time FROM jw_grid_meta
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT city FROM jw_grid_meta ORDER BY city
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jw_grid_meta ( grid_code, longitude, latitude, west_longitude, east_longitude, north_latitude, south_latitude, province, city, district, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{gridCode}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{westLongitude}, #{eastLongitude}, #{northLatitude}, #{southLatitude}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, now(), now() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE jw_grid_meta
longitude = #{longitude}, latitude = #{latitude}, west_longitude = #{westLongitude}, east_longitude = #{eastLongitude}, north_latitude = #{northLatitude}, south_latitude = #{southLatitude}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district},
update_time = now()
WHERE grid_code = #{gridCode}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM jw_grid_meta WHERE grid_code IN
#{code}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO jw_grid_meta ( grid_code, longitude, latitude, west_longitude, east_longitude, north_latitude, south_latitude, province, city, district, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
(#{item.gridCode}, #{item.longitude}, #{item.latitude}, #{item.westLongitude}, #{item.eastLongitude}, #{item.northLatitude}, #{item.southLatitude}, #{item.province}, #{item.city}, #{item.district}, #{item.poiCount}, now(), now())
